state.description: Canvas state — shape determined by canvasTypeId. Workflow authors couple to specific canvas types via downstream-node config.

canvasTypeId.description: Canvas type identifier (e.g., `'app-builder'`, `'slides'`). Useful when reads occur in a workflow that handles multiple canvas types.

version.description: Canvas state version at read time (monotonic). Workflows MAY use this for optimistic-concurrency in subsequent writes.
